name: Professional Pro-Star Meat Mincer - 90kg/h - 850W
short_description: Powerful meat mincer combining a high-performance 850W motor with durable components. Handles substantial processing volumes with ease-up to 90kg per hour.
description:
The Pro-Star Meat Mincer forms the foundation of efficient meat processing workflows. Whether you're preparing ground meat for recipes or handling bulk processing after a hunt, this machine delivers professional results.

  • High Performance: 850W motor for reliable power.
  • Capacity: Processes up to 90kg per hour.
  • Durable: Commercial-grade construction for longevity.
  • Versatile: Ideal for home and small commercial settings.

name: Professional Sausage Filler - 3L Capacity - Stainless Steel
short_description: Premium vertical sausage filler featuring robust stainless steel construction and efficient mechanical systems. Simple and consistent for professional-quality sausages.
description:
Create professional-quality sausages with ease. This 3L vertical unit provides stable, precision filling for perfect results every time.

  • Stainless Steel: Robust, hygienic construction.
  • Capacity: 3 Litre volume.
  • Mechanical Efficiency: Smooth operation for consistent filling.
  • Compact: Ideal for home enthusiasts.

name: Commercial Sausage Filler - 6.8L Capacity - Stainless Steel
short_description: Heavy-duty 6.8L sausage filler designed for small-scale producers. High-capacity processing capabilities for efficient batch preparation.
description:
Achieve commercial-quality results with our largest vertical sausage filler. Designed for efficiency and precision in professional environments.

  • High Capacity: Large 6.8 Litre volume for bulk batches.
  • Professional Grade: Built for durability and longevity.
  • Precision Engineering: Consistent results for professional production.
  • Easy Cleaning: Accessible components for simple maintenance.
